---
title: "Courses"
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

I maintain several dedicated course sites covering various aspects of spatial data science, programming, and academic tools.

## 💻 Geospatial Programming

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![R Spatial](images/agrimooc.jpg)
::: {.software-card-body}
### R for Spatial Analysis
Comprehensive guide to handling vector and raster data using R (*sf*, *terra*, *stars*).

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rspatial/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Google Earth Engine](images/geeai.jpg)
::: {.software-card-body}
### Google Earth Engine
Interactive guide and documentation for mastering cloud-based remote sensing.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/gee/intro.html){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Geo-Python](https://placehold.co/400x200/34495e/ffffff?text=Geo-Python)
::: {.software-card-body}
### Geo-Python
Learning spatial data science with Python using *Geopandas*, *Rasterio*, and *Xarray*.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geopython/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🚀 GIS & Spatial Reference

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![Cloud GIS](images/Skills/arcpro.png)
::: {.software-card-body}
### Cloud GIS & AI
Resources on merging cloud computing with artificial intelligence for advanced GIS.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/cloudgis/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Geospatial Reference](https://placehold.co/400x200/e67e22/ffffff?text=Geospatial+Reference)
::: {.software-card-body}
### Geospatial Reference
A quick-reference guide for common geospatial operations in Python, R, and GEE.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geospatial/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## ✍️ Academic Writing & Tools

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![English for Academics](images/trainings.jpg)
::: {.software-card-body}
### English for Academics
Essential resources for scientific writing, presentations, and clear academic communication.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/english/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.software-card}
![LaTeX](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c3e50/ffffff?text=LaTeX+for+Scientists)
::: {.software-card-body}
### LaTeX for Geographers
Professional document composition and high-quality thesis writing using LaTeX.

::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/latex/){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

:::


:::

:::

:::
